composite_description: No drawdown signal. Conditions do not meet any entry threshold.
brief: BTC remains 17pp of depth below the structural filter at -35% drawdown (worsening trajectory), while realized volatility sits 4pp above the 40% threshold (static). A crisis entry would require z-score below -3.0 in current bear conditions; alternatively, price recovery above the 200d MA would shift regime and enable tactical signals.
